title: Chest On A Stick - Portable Chests
description: Adds a portable hand-held chest (on a stick) that you can open by right-clicking with it in your hand.
body:
![logo](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1162/795/chest_on_a_stick_title.png)  

  This mod adds a Chest on a Stick that allows you to store items without placing any blocks.

  To open, just right-click while holding it in your hand.

  The mod also adds a Barrel On A Stick that works the same way as the Chest On A Stick as an alternative. ![In-game example:](https://i.imgur.com/tzqQ49S.png)   ![In-game example of the GUI](https://i.imgur.com/EgFVDYe.png)   ![Crafting recipe:](https://i.imgur.com/IQAadgq.png)   ![recipe](https://i.imgur.com/88dXScg.png)   ![Notes:](https://i.imgur.com/yuF0I5R.png)  - You can't place a chest on a stick inside a chest on a stick.  - You can't place a barrel on a stick inside a chest on a stick or vice versa.  - The items inside a chest on a stick stay inside it even when it's dropped on the ground.

Feel free to add this mod to your modpack!
